description.en:
Attacks the enemy.
When scoring a critical hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to activate a <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attack</color> from the ally with the highest Attack.

This attack always scores a critical hit.
description.kr:
적을 공격합니다.
치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 가장 공격력이 높은 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 발생시킵니다.

이 공격은 항상 치명 공격이 발생합니다.
description.jp:
敵単体にダメージを与える。
会心が発生した場合、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>連携</color>を発生させる。

このスキルは必ず会心が発生する。
description.zh:
攻击敌人。
发动暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使攻击力最高的友军发动<color=#28d9ed>夹攻</color>。

此攻击总是发生暴击。

description.en: Has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to grant all allies increased <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, before attacking an enemy.\nWhen scoring a critical hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Silenced</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 증가시킨 후 적을 공격합니다.\n치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: <color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>をUPさせた後、敵単体にダメージを与える。\n会心が発生した場合、対象に<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>后,攻击敌人。\n发动暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>沉默</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> on all targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nWhen scoring a critical hit on one or more enemies, has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>skill cooldowns</color> of all targets by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 감소시킵니다.\n한 명 이상의 적에게 치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>스킬 쿨타임</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で対象全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\n単体以上の敵に会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で対象全体の<color=#28d9ed>スキルターン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>増加させる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使全体目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n对1名以上的敌人发动暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使全体目标的<color=#28d9ed>技能冷却时间</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nWhen hit by a Critical Hit, increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.\nWhen an ally is hit (including the caster), increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
치명 피격 시 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>반격</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.

아군 피격 시(자신 포함) 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n会心攻撃を受けた時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。\n味方(自分を含む)がダメージを受けた時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n受到暴击时,使自身<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n当友军(含自身)受到攻击时,使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
